queries.question: Show me the platforms each content creator uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Platforms.platform_name  from Content_Creators_Platforms join Platforms on Content_Creators_Platforms.platform_id = Platforms.id join Content_Creators on Content_Creators_Platforms.content_creator_id = Content_Creators.id   GROUP BY Content_Creators_Platforms.platform_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Content_Creators_Platforms.content_creator_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Content_Creators)

queries.question: Show me the platforms each content creator uses.
queries.sql: select content_creators.name , platforms.platform_name from Content_Creators_Platforms join Platforms on Content_Creators_Platforms.platform_id = Platforms.id join Content_Creators on Content_Creators_Platforms.content_creator_id = Content_Creators.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?platform_name WHERE {
  ?content_creators_platforms a :Content_Creators_Platforms .
  ?platforms a :Platforms .
  ?content_creators_platforms p:hasPlatforms ?platforms .
  ?content_creators a :Content_Creators .
  ?content_creators_platforms p:hasContent_Creators ?content_creators .
  ?content_creators p:name ?name .
  ?platforms p:platform_name ?platform_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the platforms each content creator uses.
